initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE>
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I must reject this proposal. If I accept, I will still have nothing, and Player RED will lose half their resources. It is better for me to reject and end the game immediately rather than accept an unfair proposal. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I have no resources to trade, so I reject the proposal. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All required tags are present and in the correct order. The content is valid and parseable.

2. Payoff alignment: OK. Given that Player BLUE has no resources and cannot trade, rejecting the proposal is the only viable option. There is no alternative split that would be more beneficial for Player BLUE in this scenario.

3. Opponent plausibility: OK. Since Player BLUE has no resources, any proposal that requires them to give up resources would be rejected. The current move is the only plausible action.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason>, <player answer>, and <message> are all consistent with each other. There is no contradiction.

5. Rule compliance: OK. The move respects the rules, as Player BLUE is on move 1/4 and is correctly rejecting the proposal.
</critique>
